highlights.text: My general lean is we can re-test 5558.
Remember that after deep sells, rallies in ES/short squeezes are always caused by my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
Every deep sell is followed by a Failed Breakdown which produces a bear trap/short squeeze.
For this reason, I wrote at 4pm yesterday: “We have an active Failed Breakdown.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into the Failed Breakdowns (my core setup) we saw yesterday to cause this rally today, provided to readers in advance.

post_title: After 4 Red Weeks In A Row, Can SPX Get A Green Week? March 17th Plan
